title: planchonella elengoides
intro: Planchonella elengoides, also known as the green walnut tree, is a species of plant that belongs to the family Sapotaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been shown to have potential health benefits in treating various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues. The plant's leaves and bark can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions. In addition to its medicinal properties, Planchonella elengoides also has potential uses in the food industry, with its seeds being edible and rich in nutrients.
